entries.text:
Implement the following plan: # ActuallyShip Rebrand Plan ## Context Forking MeCoach (AI life coaching PWA) into ActuallyShip — an AI shipping coach for builders and vibe coders. The core coaching flow stays intact; we're changing the brand identity, color palette, all copy/prompts, and rebranding every feature to be builder-focused. The ActuallyShip logo is already in place at `public/logo.png`. ## 1. Brand Colors — Warm Orange + Dark Navy Replace indigo primary + amber accent with orange primary + dark navy surface. **File:** `menoach-pwa/tailwind.config.cjs` - Primary: Orange scale (`#fff7ed` → `#F97316` → `#7c2d12`) - Accent: Bright cyan/teal (`#06b6d4`) for contrast pops - Surface: Keep neutral dark palette (already good) - Update glow shadows: `glow-primary` → orange rgba, `glow-accent` → cyan rgba ## 2. HTML Meta & Title **File:** `menoach-pwa/index.html` - `MeCoach` → `ActuallyShip` - Keep theme-color `#09090b` (dark mode still works) ## 3. Package Metadata **File:** `menoach-pwa/package.json` - `"name": "mecoach-pwa"` → `"actuallyship"` - `"description"` → `"ActuallyShip - AI shipping coach for builders"` ## 4. All UI Text — "MeCoach" → "ActuallyShip" Files to update (every `MeCoach` string + alt text + taglines): | File | Changes | |------|---------| | `src/pages/Login.tsx` | Title, tagline ("Your AI life coach" → "Ship faster. Stop overthinking.") | | `src/pages/ApiKeySetup.tsx` | `

MeCoach

` → `

ActuallyShip

` | | `src/pages/OnboardingWizard.tsx` | All welcome copy, feature descriptions — rewrite for builders | | `src/pages/Onboarding.tsx` | Welcome heading | | `src/pages/Session.tsx` | Welcome message, logo alt text | | `src/pages/Settings.tsx` | "About MeCoach" section | | `src/pages/Dashboard.tsx` | Any greeting/branding text | | `server/index.ts` | Console log "MeCoach API server" | | `server/db/migrate.ts` | Console log "Running MeCoach PWA..." | ## 5. localStorage Keys — "menoach_" → "actuallyship_" | File | Key Changes | |------|-------------| | `src/stores/sessionStore.ts` | `menoach_active_session` → `actuallyship_active_session` | | `src/stores/themeStore.ts` | `menoach_theme` → `actuallyship_theme` | | `src/components/OnboardingTooltips.tsx` | `menoach_onboarding_complete`, `menoach_first_end_seen` | | `src/components/FirstVisitModal.tsx` | `menoach_onboarding_complete` | | `src/App.tsx` | `menoach_onboarding_complete` | ## 6. AI System Prompts — Complete Rewrite This is the "soul" of the rebrand. Rewrite all AI identity and instructions. **File:** `server/services/ai-streaming.ts` - Demo mode prompt: "You are ActuallyShip, an AI shipping coach for builders and vibe coders..." - Onboarding prompt: Rewrite to focus on what they're building, their shipping blockers, their goals - All references to "life coach" → "shipping coach" **File:** `server/services/coaching-engine.ts` - COACHPAL framework intro: "You are ActuallyShip, an AI shipping coach..." - Opening greeting: Builder-focused welcome - Stage descriptions: Reframe from personal growth → shipping/building context **New AI identity core:** > You are ActuallyShip, an AI shipping coach for builders and vibe coders. Your mission: help people stop overthinking, ship faster, and stay focused on what actually moves the needle. You're direct, energetic, and action-biased. You cut through analysis paralysis and help builders make progress every single day. ## 7. Session Types — Rebrand Copy **File:** `src/constants/sessionTypes.ts` | Type | Old Title → New Title | New Description | |------|----------------------|-----------------| | full | Coaching Session → Ship Session | Deep session: plan what to build, set priorities, create action items | | checkin | Quick Check-in → Quick Sync | Brief check-in on what you're working on and what's blocking you | | goalpick | Goal Deep-Dive → Goal Deep-Dive | Focus on a specific shipping goal, break it down, and plan | | braindump | Brain Dump → Brain Dump | Get everything out of your head — features, bugs, ideas | | decision | Decision Session → Decision Session | Work through a build decision: tech stack, scope, priorities | | stuck | Stuck / Obstacle → Unstuck | Name what's blocking your ship and find the smallest next step | | wins | Win Review → Ship Log | Celebrate what you shipped and spot patterns in your momentum | | vision | Vision Session → Vision Session | Dream big about what you're building — no limits | | accountability | Accountability → Accountability | Review what you committed to ship, celebrate follow-through | | build | Build Session → Build Session | Get clarity on what you're building — Orient, Explore, Land | | outreach | Contacts Mode → Outreach Mode | Relationship-building for leads and partnerships | | voicemode | Voice Mode → Voice Mode | Hands-free voice conversation with your shipping coach | | demo | Demo Mode → Demo Mode | Experience a fresh first session — no prior context | ## 8. Feature Rebranding (Keep All, New Names) | Old Feature | New Name/Context | |-------------|-----------------| | Goals | Shipping Goals | | Sparks/Ideas | Ship Notes | | Core Memories | Key Decisions | | Wisdom Log | Builder Insights | | Wheel of Life | Builder's Compass (rate areas: product, marketing, code quality, user feedback, revenue, team, learning, energy) | | Daily Rituals | Daily Standup (morning = plan sprint, evening = retro) | | Memory Cards | Context Cards | | Strategy Guide | Shipping Playbook | ## 9. Onboarding Copy Rewrite **File:** `src/pages/OnboardingWizard.tsx` — Full rewrite of all wizard steps: - Welcome: "Welcome to ActuallyShip — your AI shipping coach" - How it works: "ActuallyShip helps you cut through overthinking, ship features faster, and stay focused on what moves the needle." - Features: "Powered by Claude AI", "Track shipping goals", "Daily standups", "Voice mode for thinking out loud" ## 10. Database & .env **File:** `.env.example` - `DB_NAME=menoach` → `DB_NAME=actuallyship` No schema changes needed — all tables are generic enough. ## Files Modified (Complete List) 1. `tailwind.config.cjs` — colors, shadows 2. `index.html` — title 3. `package.json` — name, description 4. `src/pages/Login.tsx` — branding 5. `src/pages/ApiKeySetup.tsx` — branding 6. `src/pages/OnboardingWizard.tsx` — full copy rewrite 7. `src/pages/Onboarding.tsx` — branding 8. `src/pages/Session.tsx` — welcome msg, alt text 9. `src/pages/Settings.tsx` — about section 10. `src/pages/Dashboard.tsx` — greeting text if any 11. `src/stores/sessionStore.ts` — localStorage key 12. `src/stores/themeStore.ts` — localStorage key 13. `src/components/OnboardingTooltips.tsx` — localStorage keys 14. `src/components/FirstVisitModal.tsx` — localStorage key 15. `src/App.tsx` — localStorage key 16. `src/constants/sessionTypes.ts` — titles, descriptions 17. `server/services/ai-streaming.ts` — AI prompts 18. `server/services/coaching-engine.ts` — AI prompts 19. `server/index.ts` — console log 20. `server/db/migrate.ts` — console log 21. `.env.example` — DB name ## Verification 1. Run `npm run dev` and verify the app starts 2. Check Login page shows "ActuallyShip" branding with orange theme 3. Check Onboarding wizard has builder-focused copy 4. Start a session — verify AI introduces itself as ActuallyShip 5. Grep the entire codebase for "MeCoach", "mecoach", "menoach", "Menoach" — should return 0 results If you need specific details from before exiting plan mode (like exact code snippets, error messages, or content you generated), read the full transcript at: C:\Users\koalo\.claude\projects\C--Users-koalo-Desktop-ActuallyShipWebApp\c567be2f-f2ed-484b-832e-acc3823517b4.jsonl

3. I read all 21 files that need changes in parallel batches.

4. I then began making edits systematically:

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   The user provided a comprehensive rebrand plan to fork "MeCoach" (AI life coaching PWA) into "ActuallyShip" — an AI shipping coach for builders and vibe coders. The plan has 10 sections covering 21 files: brand colors (indigo→orange primary, amber→cyan accent), HTML title, package metadata, all UI text ("MeCoach"→"ActuallyShip"), localStorage keys ("menoach_"→"actuallyship_"), complete AI system prompt rewrites, session type rebranding, feature renaming, onboarding copy rewrite, and .env database name. The plan ends with a verification step: grep the entire codebase for "MeCoach", "mecoach", "menoach", "Menoach" — should return 0 results.

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - React + TypeScript PWA with Vite bundler and Tailwind CSS
   - Express + TypeScript backend with PostgreSQL
   - Zustand for state management (stores)
   - SSE (Server-Sent Events) for AI streaming
   - Multi-provider AI support (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, Groq, etc.)
   - Staged coaching flow (rapport → explore → focus → reality → options → commitment → active)
   - localStorage persistence for session state, theme, and onboarding progress
   - All application code lives in `menoach-pwa/` subdirectory

3. Files and Code Sections:

   - **`menoach-pwa/tailwind.config.cjs`** — Brand colors config
     - FULLY REWRITTEN: Replaced indigo primary (`#6366f1`) with orange scale (`#fff7ed`→`#F97316`→`#7c2d12`), replaced amber accent with cyan/teal (`#06b6d4`), updated glow shadows to orange/cyan rgba values. Surface palette kept as-is.

   - **`menoach-pwa/index.html`** — App entry point
     - Changed `<title>MeCoach</title>` → `<title>ActuallyShip</title>`

   - **`menoach-pwa/package.json`** — Package metadata
     - `"name": "mecoach-pwa"` → `"actuallyship"`, description updated

   - **`menoach-pwa/.env.example`** — Environment config
     - `DB_NAME=menoach` → `DB_NAME=actuallyship`

   - **`menoach-pwa/src/pages/Login.tsx`** — Login page branding
     - Title: "MeCoach" → "ActuallyShip", tagline: "Your AI life coach" → "Ship faster. Stop overthinking."

   - **`menoach-pwa/src/pages/ApiKeySetup.tsx`** — API key setup
     - "MeCoach" → "ActuallyShip", "coaching sessions" → "shipping sessions"

   - **`menoach-pwa/src/pages/OnboardingWizard.tsx`** — Onboarding wizard (4 screens)
     - 6 edits: All MeCoach references → ActuallyShip, rewritten copy for builder audience ("set meaningful goals" → "cut through overthinking, ship features faster"), "life coach" → "shipping coach", feature descriptions updated

   - **`menoach-pwa/src/pages/Onboarding.tsx`** — Onboarding flow (multi-step)
     - "Welcome to MeCoach" → "Welcome to ActuallyShip", "personal AI mentor for growth, goals, and getting things done" → "AI shipping coach for builders and vibe coders"

   - **`menoach-pwa/src/pages/Session.tsx`** — Session page (1142 lines, the main chat interface)
     - Logo alt text: "MeCoach" → "ActuallyShip"
     - Welcome message rewritten: "Welcome to ActuallyShip. I'm your shipping coach..." + "what are you building right now?"
     - ALL session type titles/descriptions in the inline `ALL_SESSION_TYPES` array updated: Coaching Session→Ship Session, Quick Check-in→Quick Sync, Stuck/Obstacle→Unstuck, Win Review→Ship Log, etc.
     - FirstVisitModal tips updated, "AI coach" → "shipping coach" in multiple places
     - Demo mode description updated

   - **`menoach-pwa/src/pages/Settings.tsx`** — Settings page (1109 lines)
     - "About MeCoach" section completely rewritten to describe ActuallyShip as "AI shipping coach for builders and vibe coders"

   - **`menoach-pwa/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx`** — Dashboard/home page
     - Greeting: "Ready for your coaching session?" → "What are you shipping today?"
     - CTA: "Start Coaching Session" → "Start Ship Session", "Chat with your AI mentor" → "Chat with your shipping coach"
     - Bento items: Goals→Ship Goals, Life Wheel→Builder's Compass, Ideas→Ship Notes, Memory→Context, Contacts→Outreach, Strategy Guide→Shipping Playbook
     - Tips updated accordingly

   - **`menoach-pwa/src/stores/sessionStore.ts`** — Session state management
     - `'menoach_active_session'` → `'actuallyship_active_session'`

   - **`menoach-pwa/src/stores/themeStore.ts`** — Theme state management
     - All instances of `'menoach_theme'` → `'actuallyship_theme'` (3 occurrences)

   - **`menoach-pwa/src/components/OnboardingTooltips.tsx`** — Onboarding tooltip tour
     - `'menoach_onboarding_complete'` → `'actuallyship_onboarding_complete'`
     - `'menoach_first_end_seen'` → `'actuallyship_first_end_seen'`

   - **`menoach-pwa/src/components/FirstVisitModal.tsx`** — First visit modal
     - `'menoach_onboarding_complete'` → `'actuallyship_onboarding_complete'`

   - **`menoach-pwa/src/App.tsx`** — Root app component with routing
     - `localStorage.getItem('menoach_onboarding_complete')` → `localStorage.getItem('actuallyship_onboarding_complete')`

   - **`menoach-pwa/src/constants/sessionTypes.ts`** — Session type definitions (shared constants)
     - FULLY REWRITTEN with all new titles/descriptions per plan

   - **`menoach-pwa/server/index.ts`** — Express server entry
     - Console log: "MeCoach API server" → "ActuallyShip API server"

   - **`menoach-pwa/server/db/migrate.ts`** — Database migration script
     - Console log: "Running MeCoach PWA database migration" → "Running ActuallyShip database migration"

   - **`menoach-pwa/server/services/ai-streaming.ts`** — AI streaming service (1894 lines) — **NOT YET UPDATED**
     - READ but not yet edited. Contains critical MeCoach references:
       - Line 1: Comment "AI Streaming Service for MeCoach PWA"
       - Line ~591: `CORE_IDENTITY` prompt referencing "life coach", "personal growth", "leadership"
       - Line ~657: Demo mode: `'Introduce yourself as MeCoach, an AI life coach'`
       - Line ~1343: Onboarding prompt: `'You are MeCoach, a warm and genuinely curious AI life coach'`

   - **`menoach-pwa/server/services/coaching-engine.ts`** — Coaching engine (desktop version, very large file) — **NOT YET UPDATED**
     - Only partially read (first 100 lines + grep). Contains MeCoach references:
       - Line 326: "You are MeCoach, an AI life coach meeting a brand new person..."
       - Line 328: Demo opening references "MeCoach, their AI life coach"
       - Line ~50: `buildCoreIdentityPrompt()` with same coaching-focused identity as ai-streaming.ts

4. Errors and Fixes:
   - **coaching-engine.ts too large to read**: File content (38858 tokens) exceeds maximum allowed tokens (25000). Fixed by reading first 100 lines + using Grep to find MeCoach references.
   - **Sibling tool call errors**: When coaching-engine.ts read failed, the parallel reads of server/index.ts and server/db/migrate.ts also errored with "Sibling tool call errored". Fixed by re-reading those files in a separate call.

5. Problem Solving:
   - Successfully handled the large file issue by using partial reads and grep
   - Systematically worked through 19 of 21 files in the plan
   - Used parallel tool calls where possible to maximize speed

6. All User Messages:
   - Message 1: "Implement the following plan: [Full ActuallyShip Rebrand Plan with 10 sections, 21 files, detailed change specifications including new AI identity, session types, feature names, color palette, localStorage keys, and verification steps]"
   - Message 2: (Summary request - current message)

7. Pending Tasks:
   - **Update `server/services/ai-streaming.ts`** — Rewrite AI prompts:
     - File comment: "MeCoach PWA" → "ActuallyShip"
     - `CORE_IDENTITY` prompt: Rewrite from life coach to shipping coach identity per plan's "New AI identity core"
     - Demo mode prompt (~line 657): "MeCoach, an AI life coach" → ActuallyShip shipping coach
     - Onboarding prompt (~line 1343): "MeCoach" → ActuallyShip, "life coach" → shipping coach
     - Session type prompts: Update coaching language to builder/shipping language
   - **Update `server/services/coaching-engine.ts`** — Rewrite AI prompts:
     - `buildCoreIdentityPrompt()`: Same identity rewrite as above
     - Demo mode prompts (lines 326, 328): "MeCoach" → ActuallyShip
   - **Verification grep**: Search entire codebase for "MeCoach", "mecoach", "menoach", "Menoach" — should return 0 results
   - **Mark task #1 as completed** and potentially run `npm run dev` verification

8. Current Work:
   I was in the middle of systematically editing all 21 files from the rebrand plan. I had just finished writing `src/constants/sessionTypes.ts` with the full rewrite. The last tool call result was the successful write of sessionTypes.ts. I completed 19 of 21 files. The two remaining files are the AI prompt files on the server side: `server/services/ai-streaming.ts` and `server/services/coaching-engine.ts`.

9. Optional Next Step:
   Update `menoach-pwa/server/services/ai-streaming.ts` with the AI prompt rewrites. Specifically:
   - Replace the file comment "AI Streaming Service for MeCoach PWA"
   - Rewrite `CORE_IDENTITY` from life coaching to shipping coaching per the plan's identity: "You are ActuallyShip, an AI shipping coach for builders and vibe coders. Your mission: help people stop overthinking, ship faster, and stay focused on what actually moves the needle. You're direct, energetic, and action-biased."
   - Update demo mode prompt (line ~657): Replace "MeCoach, an AI life coach"
   - Update onboarding prompt (line ~1343): Replace "MeCoach" references

   Then update `coaching-engine.ts` similarly, then run the verification grep.

**Rebrand complete.** All references to MeCoach/mecoach/menoach have been replaced with ActuallyShip across the entire codebase. Here's a summary of everything updated:

**Config files (4):** tailwind.config.cjs (orange colors), index.html, package.json, package-lock.json, .env.example

**UI pages (9):** Login, ApiKeySetup, OnboardingWizard, Onboarding, Session, Settings, Dashboard, History, Outreach, StrategyGuide

**Components (3):** OnboardingTooltips, FirstVisitModal, OnboardingTour

**Stores & lib (3):** sessionStore, themeStore, fetch.ts, api.ts

[subagent] Design a detailed implementation plan for a BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) API key setup screen in the ActuallyShip PWA.

## Background Context

This is a React + TypeScript PWA with an Express backend and PostgreSQL. The app already has:

### Existing Provider Infrastructure (`src/ai-providers.ts`)
- 6 providers defined: Anthropic, OpenAI, Google Gemini, xAI (Grok), Groq, OpenRouter
- Each has: id, label, placeholder, helpText, helpUrl, helpLinkText, models[]
- Type: `ProviderName = 'anthropic' | 'openai' | 'google' | 'xai' | 'groq' | 'openrouter'`

### Existing API Key Setup Page (`src/pages/ApiKeySetup.tsx`)
- Currently Groq-only, very basic. Takes an `onComplete` callback prop
- Uses `window.api.setSetting('apiKey_groq', groqKey)` to save
- Not currently wired into the routing flow (orphaned component)

### Existing Settings API Key Section (`src/pages/Settings.tsx` ~line 347-460)
- Full multi-provider support with dropdown, per-provider key input, model selector
- Saves via `api.setSetting('provider', provider)` and `api.setSetting('apiKey_${provider}', key)`
- Has custom model support for OpenRouter

### Key Storage (`server/routes/api.ts`)
- Settings stored in `settings` table: (user_id, key, value) with ON CONFLICT upsert
- Keys stored as PLAIN TEXT currently
- `POST /api-key/test` endpoint saves key + provider + model + aiMode in one call
- `GET /api-key/has-key` checks if any apiKey_* setting exists

### AI Config Resolution (`server/services/ai-streaming.ts` `getAiConfigForUser()`)
- Reads `provider` setting, then `apiKey_${provider}` from DB
- Has legacy fallbacks (anthropicApiKey, apiKey)
- Falls back to server's `process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` if no user key
- Keys are read from DB settings table and used directly

### App Routing (`src/App.tsx`)
- Auth guard: unauthenticated → /login
- No current API key gate — user can access full app without a key
- Onboarding check is localStorage-based (`actuallyship_onboarding_complete`)
- After auth, renders TabBar + routes

### Built-in Key Support
- Server has `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` env var as a built-in fallback
- `__HAS_EMBEDDED_KEY__` flag hides API setup UI in Settings when set
- `useBuiltInKey` setting flag for users on built-in

### Frontend API (`src/api.ts`)
- `api.hasApiKey()` → GET /api-key/has-key → { hasKey: boolean }
- `api.testApiKeyLive(key, provider)` → POST /api-key/test → { valid: boolean, reason? }
- `api.setSetting(key, value)` → PUT /settings/:key
- `api.getSetting(key)` → GET /settings/:key

## Requirements

1. **Multi-provider selection** — Let users choose from all 6 supported providers
2. **API key input** — Text input to paste key for selected provider
3. **Encrypted storage** — Add server-side encryption for stored API keys
4. **Route gating** — Block access to main app until a key is set (but allow if server has built-in key)
5. **Settings update** — Allow changing key later in Settings (already works, just needs encryption to match)
6. **Friendly explanations** — Show why needed + where to get key for each provider

## Design Constraints

- Reuse `PROVIDERS` config from `ai-providers.ts` (don't duplicate)
- Reuse existing `POST /api-key/test` endpoint pattern for saving
- Keep UI on-brand (orange primary, dark navy surface, builder tone)
- Must work with existing `getAiConfigForUser()` which reads raw key values from DB
- Server-side AES-256-GCM encryption using `API_KEY_SECRET` env var with fallback
- Encryption must be transparent: encrypt on write, decrypt on read

## Plan Requirements

Provide a detailed step-by-step implementation plan including:
1. Server-side encryption utility (new file)
2. Modifications to server routes to encrypt on save, decrypt on read
3. Modifications to `getAiConfigForUser()` to decrypt keys
4. Rewrite of `ApiKeySetup.tsx` as a proper multi-provider BYOK page
5. Route gating in `App.tsx`
6. Any changes needed to Settings.tsx to stay in sync
7. Migration considerations (existing plain-text keys)
